name: Lobster Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and finely chopped
1 tbsp Fresh Basil, chopped (or 1 tsp Dried Basil)
1 1/2 cups Lobster Meat, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauce: In a medium bowl, combine the chopped tomatoes, chopped Italian parsley, fresh basil (or dried basil), minced garlic, lemon juice. Whisk in the grapeseed or canola oil and salt and pepper to taste until blended. Cover and let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Salad:
